schema.description: Amazon Product Advertising API 5.0 integration for searching products, retrieving details, variations, browse nodes, and deals for affiliate marketing.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search the Amazon product catalog by keywords with optional category filtering and pagination.

keywords.description: Search query terms to find products in the Amazon catalog.

search_index.description: Product category to search within (e.g., 'All', 'Electronics', 'Books'). Defaults to 'All'.

item_page.description: Pagination page number (1-10) for navigating large result sets. Defaults to 1.

resources.description: Specific data fields to include in the response, such as 'Images', 'ItemInfo', 'Offers', or 'CustomerReviews'.

products.description: Array of product results matching the search criteria.

ASIN.description: The unique Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) assigned to the product.

title.description: The display title or name of the product.

detail_page_url.description: The canonical URL to the product's detail page on Amazon.

image_url.description: URL to the primary product image.

rating.description: The average customer rating score, typically ranging from 0.0 to 5.0.

total_reviews.description: The total count of customer reviews submitted for the product.

tools.name: get_items
tools.description: Retrieve detailed product information for specific Amazon items by their ASINs.

asins.description: List of Amazon Standard Identification Numbers (ASINs) to retrieve detailed information for (maximum 10 items).

resources.description: Specific data fields to include in the response, such as 'Images', 'ItemInfo', 'Offers', or 'CustomerReviews'.

items.description: Array of detailed product information objects.

ASIN.description: The unique Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) assigned to the product.

title.description: The display title or name of the product.

features.description: List of key product features and bullet points.

images.description: Collection of image URLs for the product gallery.

rating.description: The average customer rating score, typically ranging from 0.0 to 5.0.

total_reviews.description: The total count of customer reviews submitted for the product.

availability.description: The current stock availability status (e.g., 'In Stock', 'Out of Stock').

tools.name: get_variations
tools.description: Retrieve product variations (size, color, style options) for a parent ASIN.

asin.description: The parent product ASIN for which to retrieve size, color, or style variations.

resources.description: Specific data fields to include in the response, such as 'Images', 'ItemInfo', 'Offers', or 'CustomerReviews'.

variations.description: Array of product variation objects representing different size, color, or style options.

ASIN.description: The unique Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) assigned to the product.

title.description: The display title or name of the product.

variation_attributes.description: Dictionary mapping variation dimensions (e.g., 'Color', 'Size') to specific values.

availability.description: The current stock availability status (e.g., 'In Stock', 'Out of Stock').

tools.name: get_browse_nodes
tools.description: Retrieve category hierarchy and metadata for specific browse node IDs.

browse_node_ids.description: List of category/browse node identifiers to retrieve hierarchy information for.

browse_nodes.description: Array of browse node objects representing categories and their hierarchy.

id.description: The unique identifier of the browse node/category.

name.description: The display name of the category or browse node.

is_root.description: Indicates whether this node is a root-level category.

children.description: List of child subcategories under this node.

ancestors.description: List of parent categories in the hierarchy path.

tools.name: get_deals
tools.description: Retrieve current deals, promotions, and discounts available on Amazon.

deal_types.description: Types of promotions to filter by (e.g., 'LightningDeals', 'BestDeals').

deals.description: Array of active deal and promotion objects.

ASIN.description: The unique Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) assigned to the product.

title.description: The display title or name of the product.

deal_price.description: The current promotional or discounted price.

list_price.description: The original retail price before discount.

discount_percent.description: Percentage reduction from the list price.

end_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the deal expires.

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with one product, one item, and minimal browse node structure
Scenario with multiple products across categories, deals, and browse node hierarchy

B08N5WRWNW.title: Apple iPhone 12
B08N5WRWNW.description: 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display, 5G capable smartphone

scenarios.description: Complex scenario with extensive product catalog, nested variations, deals, and comprehensive browse tree

B08N5WRWNW.title: Apple iPhone 12 Pro Max
B08N5WRWNW.description: 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR display, 5G capable with A14 Bionic chip

B08QRGC9WL.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Headphones
B08QRGC9WL.description: Industry-leading noise canceling with Dual Noise Sensor technology

B08H95Y452.title: Kindle Paperwhite
B08H95Y452.description: Now waterproof, 8GB storage, adjustable warm light

scenarios.description: Test boundary conditions with zero prices, empty collections, and invalid ASIN pattern (should be rejected)

errors.details:
1 validation error for Product
INVALID!@#$%.rating
  ensure this value is less than or equal to 5 [type=value_error.number.not_le; input_value=5.5, limit_value=5]
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected validation error due to invalid scenario data, and received validation error for rating field (5.5 > 5)
errors.root_cause: The scenario contains invalid data - specifically a product with rating 5.5 which exceeds the maximum allowed value of 5. The validation correctly caught this boundary violation.
